siteFormQuestions.helpText: Prepopulated from the postcode and address.

options.label: The location is planned to be opened

siteFormQuestions.helpText: A Best Start Family Hub is a physical place with BSFH branding, EBIs delivered and SEND professionals in place.

options.label: Working towards becoming a Best Start Family Hub

siteFormQuestions.helpText: Has to be a date in the future.

siteFormQuestions.helpText: Has to be a date in the past.

siteFormQuestions.hint: For example, a library or doctor's surgery.

options.label: Feedback surveys through hubs or services

dataCollectionFormModules.name: Service users
dataCollectionFormModules.description: Tell us about the users who accessed the service over the past 3 months. This information will be included in your quarterly Management Information data collection.

sections.title: Service delivery
sections.description: Tell us if this service was delivered this quarter.

sections.title: User numbers
sections.description: Tell us about the number of users who accessed this service.

sections.title: User demographics and data collection
sections.description: Tell us about the demographics of users and data collection practices.

sections.title: Clarification comments
sections.description: Provide any additional clarification if needed.

fields.label: Was the service delivered for users this quarter?
Do you have data on how many people use this service?
fields.helpText: This includes centrally collected data or any information received from partners.

fields.label: How many people used this service over the relevant quarter?
fields.helpText: Give a figure for the last 3 months. This includes service users across all delivery methods.

fields.label: How many people used this service online over the relevant quarter?
fields.helpText: Should not be higher than the total number of users.

fields.label: Have you used a method for counting unique individuals who attend this service?
fields.helpText: For example, are you able to discount repeat visits?

fields.label: Which types of user are included in your data?
fields.helpText: Select all that apply. If you don't have the data, select 'Unknown'.

fields.label: Do you have data on how many people used this service in the relevant quarter, by ethnicity?
White British
fields.configuration: {"min": 0, "group": "QSU08", "width": "5", "suffix": "users", "sumGroup": "ethnicity", "groupHint": "The number of users reported for all ethnic groups cannot exceed the total number of service users reported.", "groupLabel": "How many people used this service, by ethnicity?", "maxSumField": "QSU03"}

fields.label: Black, African, Caribbean or Black British
Do you have data on how many people used this service in the relevant quarter, by IDACI decile?
fields.helpText: The Income Deprivation Affecting Children Index (IDACI) measures the proportion of all children aged 0 to 15 living in income deprived families.

fields.label: IDACI Decile 1
fields.configuration: {"min": 0, "group": "QSU10", "width": "5", "suffix": "users", "sumGroup": "imd", "groupHint": "The number of users reported for all IDACI deciles cannot exceed the total number of service users reported.", "groupLabel": "How many people used the service in the relevant quarter, by IDACI decile?", "maxSumField": "QSU03"}

fields.label: Do you have data on how many people used this service in the relevant quarter, by biological sex?
Male
fields.configuration: {"min": 0, "group": "QSU12", "width": "5", "suffix": "users", "sumGroup": "sex", "groupHint": "The total for all sexes cannot exceed the total number of users reported for the service.", "groupLabel": "How many people used your service in the last quarter, by biological sex?", "maxSumField": "QSU03"}

fields.label: Do you have data on how many people used this service in the relevant quarter, by age group?
0-2 years
fields.configuration: {"min": 0, "group": "QSU13", "width": "5", "suffix": "users", "sumGroup": "age", "groupHint": "The total for all age groups cannot exceed the total number of users reported for the service.", "groupLabel": "How many people used your service in the relevant quarter, by age?", "maxSumField": "QSU03"}

fields.label: Did the service provider collect pre and post outcome scores for users who accessed this service this quarter?
How many service users completed a pre- and post- outcome score for this service in the relevant quarter?
fields.helpText: Cannot be higher than the total number of users.

fields.label: Do you have data on waiting times for this service?
fields.helpText: Waiting times should be provided for services funded by the Perinatal Mental Health, Parent Infant Relationship and Infant Feeding strands.

fields.label: What was the average waiting time from referral to first appointment?
fields.helpText: Provide the average for the relevant quarter in days.

fields.label: Provide more information about waiting times (optional)
fields.helpText: Your comments from previous quarterly collections are shown for reference. Update them if needed.

dataCollectionFormModules.name: Wider service users
dataCollectionFormModules.description: Tell us about the users who accessed wider services in this category in the relevant quarter.

sections.title: Wider Service Users
sections.description: Provide data for {widerServiceCategoryName}

fields.label: How many people have used wider services in this category in the last 3 months?
fields.helpText: Give numbers of unique users for the relevant quarter. This should not include service user numbers for any services reported under section 2.

dataCollectionFormModules.name: Outcome scores
dataCollectionFormModules.description: Tell us about outcome scores for service users who used one of your services in the past 3 months. This information will be included in your quarterly Management Information data collection.

sections.title: Service selection
sections.description: Select the service this outcome relates to.

sections.title: Outcome measures
sections.description: Tell us which outcome measure(s) the parent or carer completed.

sections.title: User demographics
sections.description: Tell us about the demographics of the user.

sections.title: Intervention scores
sections.description: Provide the user's pre- and post-intervention scores.

sections.title: Clarification comments
sections.description: Provide any additional clarification if needed.

fields.label: What service does the outcome measure relate to?
What outcome measure(s) did this parent or carer complete?
fields.helpText: Select all that apply.

options.label: Black, African, Caribbean or Black British

fields.label: What is the user's biological sex?
What is the user's IDACI decile?
fields.helpText: Must be a number between 1 and 10.

fields.label: Pre-intervention ASQ-3 score
fields.helpText: Number between 0 and 60.
fields.configuration: {"max": 60, "min": 0, "group": "PPS06", "width": "5", "groupLabel": "What were this parent or carer's ASQ-3 scores pre- and post-intervention?"}

fields.label: Post-intervention ASQ-3 score
fields.helpText: Number between 0 and 60.

fields.label: Pre-intervention CPRS-SF score
fields.configuration: {"min": 0, "group": "PPS07", "width": "5", "groupLabel": "What were this parent or carer's CPRS-SF scores pre- and post-intervention?"}

fields.label: Pre-intervention GAD-7 score
fields.helpText: Number between 0 and 21.
fields.configuration: {"max": 21, "min": 0, "group": "PPS08", "width": "5", "groupLabel": "What were this parent or carer's GAD-7 scores pre- and post-intervention?"}

fields.label: Post-intervention GAD-7 score
fields.helpText: Number between 0 and 21.

fields.label: Pre-intervention HLE score
fields.configuration: {"min": 0, "group": "PPS09", "width": "5", "groupLabel": "What were this parent or carer's HLE scores pre- and post-intervention?"}

fields.label: Pre-intervention KPCS score
fields.helpText: Number between 0 and 45.
fields.configuration: {"max": 45, "min": 0, "group": "PPS10", "width": "5", "groupLabel": "What were this parent or carer's KPCS scores pre- and post-intervention?"}

fields.label: Post-intervention KPCS score
fields.helpText: Number between 0 and 45.

fields.label: Pre-intervention MORS-SF score
fields.helpText: Number between 0 and 35.
fields.configuration: {"max": 35, "min": 0, "group": "PPS11", "width": "5", "groupLabel": "What were this parent or carer's MORS-SF scores pre- and post-intervention?"}

fields.label: Post-intervention MORS-SF score
fields.helpText: Number between 0 and 35.

fields.label: Pre-intervention PHQ-9 score
fields.helpText: Number between 0 and 27.
fields.configuration: {"max": 27, "min": 0, "group": "PPS12", "width": "5", "groupLabel": "What were this parent or carer's PHQ-9 scores pre- and post-intervention?"}

fields.label: Post-intervention PHQ-9 score
fields.helpText: Number between 0 and 27.

fields.label: Pre-intervention PSS score
fields.helpText: Number between 0 and 40.
fields.configuration: {"max": 40, "min": 0, "group": "PPS13", "width": "5", "groupLabel": "What were this parent or carer's PSS scores pre- and post-intervention?"}

fields.label: Post-intervention PSS score
fields.helpText: Number between 0 and 40.

fields.label: Pre-intervention SWEMWBS score
fields.helpText: Number between 7 and 35.
fields.configuration: {"max": 35, "min": 7, "group": "PPS14", "width": "5", "groupLabel": "What were this parent or carer's SWEMWBS scores pre- and post-intervention?"}

fields.label: Post-intervention SWEMWBS score
fields.helpText: Number between 7 and 35.

fields.label: Pre-intervention 'Other' score
fields.configuration: {"min": 0, "group": "PPS15", "width": "5", "groupLabel": "What were this parent or carer's 'Other' scores pre- and post-intervention?"}

fields.label: Would you like to upload a case study (optional)?
fields.helpText: If you have evidence or examples of approaches which have improved user outcomes, you can upload them here. For example, you might like to tell us about how you have brought different services together to create better outcomes or how you have tested new approaches. Use the case study template to create your case study.

fields.label: Provide more information about outcome scores (optional)
fields.helpText: Your comments from previous quarterly collections are shown for reference. Update them if needed.

sections.description: Tell us about each training activity or course offered to staff.

fields.label: What is the title of the activity or course?
fields.helpText: If the training activity does not have a title, give a short description.

fields.label: Is the training still being offered?

options.label: Yes and the training description is the same
Yes and I have changed the training description
No - the training activity is no longer offered
N/A - this is a new training activity

fields.helpText: Give the total number of attendees for the relevant quarter.

fields.label: Provide more information (optional)
fields.helpText: For example, tell us if the information you entered does not properly capture information about your training. Your comments from previous quarterly collections are shown for reference. Update them if needed.
